properties.name: darl.rate-limiter.default-algorithm
properties.description: Default algorithm used when no client-specific config is found in PostgreSQL.

properties.name: darl.rate-limiter.default-burst-size
properties.description: Max burst size for token bucket algorithm.

properties.name: darl.rate-limiter.default-rate-per-second
properties.description: Baseline requests/second for new clients without a config entry.

properties.name: darl.rate-limiter.default-window-seconds
properties.description: Window length in seconds for sliding/fixed window algorithms.
